The '''Paonga Strait''' was a channel in [[Lake Paonga/Legends|Lake Paonga]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] that connected [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] to the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|sacred place]] in the [[Lianorm Swamp/Legends|Lianorm Swamp]].
